hospitalityHero.label: Hospitality Development
hospitalityHero.heading: Designing Experiences Rooted in Landscape, Culture, and Stillness.
hospitalityHero.subheading: Afari Trails envisions hospitality experiences that blend architecture, wilderness, sustainability, and immersive storytelling across Africa.
hospitalityHero.imageAlt: Luxury safari lodge architecture overlooking wilderness at dusk

hospitalityPhilosophy.label: Our Philosophy
hospitalityPhilosophy.statement: We believe hospitality should create a sense of belonging, connection, and immersion within the landscapes and cultures that surround it.

items.title: Eco Lodges
items.description: Low-impact wilderness retreats immersed in landscape and story.

items.title: Safari Camps
items.description: Immersive expedition-based hospitality shaped by the rhythm of the wild.

items.title: Wellness Retreats
items.description: Stillness, nature, and restoration — paced for presence, not performance.

items.title: Cultural Hospitality Experiences
items.description: Locally rooted storytelling and cultural immersion at the heart of every stay.

items.title: Sustainable Destination Development
items.description: Long-term hospitality ecosystems built responsibly across regions and communities.

items.title: Boutique Wilderness Escapes
items.description: Private, intimate experiences designed for deep connection to place.

hospitalityDesign.label: Architecture & Design
hospitalityDesign.heading: Built to belong.
hospitalityDesign.body: Natural materials, open-air architecture, earthy textures, and handcrafted interiors — structures that blend into landscape through local craftsmanship and sustainable design. Every space is considered: light, air, silence, and the view beyond the deck.

hospitalityExperience.label: Experience Philosophy
hospitalityExperience.quote: True luxury is space, silence, and emotional connection to place.

hospitalityDestinations.label: Future Destinations
hospitalityDestinations.heading: Horizons we are shaping.
hospitalityDestinations.intro: Conceptual today — expansive tomorrow. Destinations envisioned across Africa's most extraordinary landscapes.

pillars.title: Low-Impact Construction
pillars.description: Structures that touch the land lightly and endure with grace.

pillars.title: Renewable Systems
pillars.description: Energy and water designed for wilderness operations.

pillars.title: Conservation Partnerships
pillars.description: Hospitality aligned with protection of wild places.

pillars.title: Local Sourcing
pillars.description: Materials, craft, and food rooted in surrounding communities.

pillars.title: Community Integration
pillars.description: Employment and collaboration at the center of development.

pillars.title: Responsible Tourism
pillars.description: Travel that leaves people and landscapes stronger.

hospitalityPartnership.heading: Partnership & Investment
hospitalityPartnership.body: Afari Trails welcomes aligned partnerships in hospitality, architecture, conservation, and destination development across Africa.

hospitalityEcosystem.label: The Afari Ecosystem
hospitalityEcosystem.heading: One vision. Many connected paths.
hospitalityEcosystem.body: Hospitality forms part of a wider Afari ecosystem connecting exploration, sustainability, culture, and immersive African living.

hospitalityClosing.quote: Hospitality is not only where people stay. It is how people feel remembered by a place.
